div1.entryFree: Handsome, well made, of a winning exterior and manners; used of male persons: Wiv. III, 4, 33. Ado II, 1, 58. All's III, 5, 83. R3 I, 3, 101. Rom. II, 5, 57. Oth. II, 1, 250. IV, 3, 36. Ant. I, 2, 75. Per. II, 1, 84. Of male attire: Ado IV, 2, 89. V, 4, 105 (== becoming, elegant, tasteful?). Of female dress: prove that ever I dress myself h. H4B II, 4, 303 (Doll's speech). Of horses: H8 II, 2, 4. Of the style in writing: an honest method, as wholesome as sweet, and by very much more h. than fine, Hml. II, 2, 466 (perhaps == becoming, fit, to the purpose).
